user_query: What is a fun finger food dinner option for child

selected_nodes.name: Chicken Fajita Bowl — Sesame Wrap
selected_nodes.short_description: A protein-forward fajita bowl with chicken, peppers, onion, rice, and avocado, finished with sesame-inspired flavor.
selected_nodes.meal_suggestion: For more fiber or lower glycemic load, swap white rice for brown rice or cauliflower rice, and keep avocado. If making a wrap, use a sesame wrap with the same fillings and consider adding salsa or lime for brightness.
selected_nodes.nutrition_note: Protein-rich chicken with peppers and onion provides fiber and micronutrients; rice supplies energy with carbohydrates; avocado adds heart-healthy fats and satiety. Sesame wrap variation can add extra fats and flavor. Salt content depends on seasoning.
selected_nodes.tree_path: Root > MealPlan_Version 1 > Child > Day 7 > Dinner > Chicken Fajita Bowl — Sesame Wrap
selected_nodes.reasoning: The Chicken Fajita Bowl includes a 'Sesame Wrap' variation, which is a classic finger food format suitable for children.

selected_nodes.name: Homemade Pizza Night — Mild-Spice Wrap
selected_nodes.short_description: Mild pizza-inspired wrap with whole-wheat crust, tomato sauce, mozzarella, mushrooms, and bell pepper — a fiber-rich, veggie-forward dish with calcium and protein.
selected_nodes.meal_suggestion: Serve as a 1-wrap portion; pair with a large green salad and water to create a balanced meal.
selected_nodes.nutrition_note: Fiber from whole-wheat crust supports fullness; vegetables add vitamins, while mozzarella provides protein and calcium. Monitor sodium and saturated fat from cheese and sauce; for a lighter option, use part-skim mozzarella and a bit less cheese, and pair with a side salad to boost fiber.
selected_nodes.tree_path: Root > MealPlan_Version 1 > Child > Day 7 > Dinner > Homemade Pizza Night — Mild-Spice Wrap
selected_nodes.reasoning: Homemade Pizza Night is described as a 'Mild-Spice Wrap' and 'pizza-inspired wrap,' which is a fun, hand-held finger food option for a child.
